title: Brevo vs Substack (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Substack for email marketing. See pricing, features, and which tool fits your needs.
h1: Brevo vs Substack: Detailed Comparison for 2025
intro: Brevo and Substack serve different email marketing needs despite both being popular platforms. Brevo is a comprehensive CRM suite designed for businesses managing customer communications across multiple channels, while Substack is built for independent writers and creators wanting to monetize newsletters directly. Understanding their core differences will help you choose the right platform for your goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: Free with revenue-share model (no fixed fees)

comparison_table.tool_a: Up to 100,000 contacts on free tier
SMS, WhatsApp, CRM, transactional email API, multi-channel marketing
comparison_table.tool_b: Paid subscriptions, podcast hosting, built-in audience discovery

comparison_table.tool_a: Yes (5 EUR per free signup + 100 EUR per paid)

choose_a_if: You need a full CRM suite with SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat capabilities
You're sending transactional emails and need an API for business communications
You want an affordable solution for managing customer relationships across channels
choose_b_if: You're an independent writer or creator looking to monetize through subscriber payments
You want unlimited subscribers without worrying about tier limitations
You prefer simplicity and don't need advanced business automation features

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Brevo is superior for businesses needing multi-channel marketing, CRM features, and transactional email capabilities. Substack is better for individual creators and writers focused on direct subscriber monetization. They serve fundamentally different purposes rather than competing directly.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Substack?
faq.a: Substack is cheaper if you're just startingŚit's completely free and takes a revenue cut only when you earn from paid subscriptions. Brevo requires a $25/month minimum for paid plans, though it offers an unlimited free tier for up to 100,000 contacts. Your budget will depend on your subscriber count and revenue model.

faq.q: Can I switch from Substack to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, you can export your subscriber list from Substack and import it into Brevo, though you may lose some formatting or subscription tier information. Brevo lacks Substack's native paid subscription features, so you'd need alternative payment processing. The switch works better for creators transitioning to business-focused email marketing.
